lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੇਰੀ ਦਇਆ ਸਲਾਹੇ ਸੋਇ ਤੁਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis no teree deaa salaahe soe tudh |
lines.english: He alone praises You, who is blessed by Your Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਧੁ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: jis gur bhette naanak niramal soee sudh |20|
lines.english: One who meets the Guru, O Nanak, is immaculate and sanctified. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਤੇਰੇ ਭਗਤ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਸਚੁ ਤੂੰ ਡਿਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su tere bhagat jinaee sach toon dditthaa |
lines.english: Blessed are Your devotees, who see You, O True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਰੀਦਾ ਭੂਮਿ ਰੰਗਾਵਲੀ ਮੰਝਿ ਵਿਸੂਲਾ ਬਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: fareedaa bhoom rangaavalee manjh visoolaa baag |
lines.english: Fareed, this world is beautiful, but there is a thorny garden within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਨਰ ਪੀਰਿ ਨਿਵਾਜਿਆ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਅੰਚ ਨ ਲਾਗ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo nar peer nivaajiaa tinaa anch na laag |1|
lines.english: Those who are blessed by their spiritual teacher are not even scratched. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਰਲੇ ਕੇਈ ਪਾਈਅਨੑਿ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਨੇਹ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: virale keee paaeeana jinaa piaare neh |2|
lines.english: How rare are those who are found to love their Beloved Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਰੀਦਾ ਉਮਰ ਸੁਹਾਵੜੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੁਵੰਨੜੀ ਦੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: fareedaa umar suhaavarree sang suvanarree deh |
lines.english: Fareed, blessed is the life, with such a beautiful body.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਬੁਝਾਇਹਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਆਪਿ ਸੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis bujhaaeihi agan aap so naam dhiaae |
lines.english: He alone meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, whose fire the Lord puts out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਦਇਆ ਧਰਮੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਸੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam deaa dharam jis dehi su paae |
lines.english: He alone obtains meditation, austerities, self-discipline, compassion and Dharmic faith, whom the Lord so blesses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਅਗਮ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਇਕ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਦਿਖਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: antarajaamee agam purakh ik drisatt dikhaae |
lines.english: The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, the Inaccessible Primal Lord, inspires us to look upon all with an impartial eye.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਕੈ ਆਸਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਿਉ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat kai aasarai prabh siau rang laae |
lines.english: With the support of the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, one falls in love with God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਭਉ ਕਟਿਓਨੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran bhau kattion fir jon na paae |
lines.english: The fear of birth and death is removed, and he is not reincarnated again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣ ਕਟਿ ਮੁਖੁ ਉਜਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਤਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aaugan katt mukh ujalaa har naam taraae |
lines.english: One's faults are eradicated, and one's face becomes radiant and bright; through the Lord's Name, one crosses over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਰਖੇ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਏ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bakhas milaaeian rakhe gal laae |21|
lines.english: O Nanak, God forgives him, and holds him close in His embrace. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਤੇ ਕਾਢਿਅਨੁ ਲੜੁ ਆਪਿ ਫੜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: andh koop te kaadtian larr aap farraae |
lines.english: God lifts him up and pulls him out of the deep, dark pit, and attaches him to the hem of His robe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਪਾਈਅਹਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਮੂਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak virale paaeeeh tis jan keem na mool |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, such a person is rarely found; the value of such a humble person can never be estimated. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹਬਤਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਖੁਦਾਇ ਦੀ ਰਤਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: muhabat jis khudaae dee rataa rang chalool |
lines.english: One who loves God is imbued with the deep crimson color of His love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਵਿਆ ਹਭ ਥਾਇ ਵਣਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਣਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣਿ ਰੋਮਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak raviaa habh thaae van trin tribhavan rom |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, He is pervading and permeating all places, the forests and the meadows, the three worlds, and every hair. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰੁ ਵਿਧਾ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਭੀ ਸਚੁ ਡਿਠੋਮਿ ॥
lines.translit: andar vidhaa sach naae baahar bhee sach dditthom |
lines.english: The True Name has pierced the nucleus of my self deep within. Outside, I see the True Lord as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕੀਤੋ ਰਚਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਰਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape keeto rachan aape hee ratiaa |
lines.english: He Himself created the Universe; He Himself imbues it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੋਇਓ ਇਕੁ ਆਪੇ ਬਹੁ ਭਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape hoeo ik aape bahu bhatiaa |
lines.english: He Himself is One, and He Himself has numerous forms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਭਨਾ ਮੰਝਿ ਆਪੇ ਬਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape sabhanaa manjh aape baaharaa |
lines.english: He Himself is within all, and He Himself is beyond them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਜਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape jaaneh door aape hee jaaharaa |
lines.english: He Himself is known to be far away, and He Himself is right here.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਆਪੇ ਪਰਗਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: aape hoveh gupat aape paragatteeai |
lines.english: He Himself is hidden, and He Himself is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਪਾਇ ਤੇਰੀ ਥਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: keemat kisai na paae teree thatteeai |
lines.english: No one can estimate the value of Your Creation, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੁ ਅਥਾਹੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਅਗਣਤੁ ਤੂੰ ॥
lines.translit: gahir ganbheer athaahu apaar aganat toon |
lines.english: You are deep and profound, unfathomable, infinite and invaluable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਰਤੈ ਇਕੁ ਇਕੋ ਇਕੁ ਤੂੰ ॥੨੨॥੧॥੨॥ ਸੁਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak varatai ik iko ik toon |22|1|2| sudh |
lines.english: O Nanak, the One Lord is all-pervading. You are the One and only. ||22||1||2|| Sudh||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਰਾਇ ਬਲਵੰਡਿ ਤਥਾ ਸਤੈ ਡੂਮਿ ਆਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee kee vaar raae balavandd tathaa satai ddoom aakhee |
lines.english: Vaar Of Raamkalee, Uttered By Satta And Balwand The Drummer:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇ ਗੁਨਾ ਸਤਿ ਭੈਣ ਭਰਾਵ ਹੈ ਪਾਰੰਗਤਿ ਦਾਨੁ ਪੜੀਵਦੈ ॥
lines.translit: de gunaa sat bhain bharaav hai paarangat daan parreevadai |
lines.english: His divine virtues are the true sisters and brothers; through them, the gift of supreme status is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਾਦਰੁ ਕਰੇ ਕਿਉ ਬੋਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਜੋਖੀਵਦੈ ॥
lines.translit: naau karataa kaadar kare kiau bol hovai jokheevadai |
lines.english: One who chants the Name of the Almighty Creator - how can his words be judged?

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਹਣੇ ਧਰਿਓਨੁ ਛਤੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਿਫਤੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵਦੈ ॥
lines.translit: lahane dharion chhat sir kar sifatee amrit peevadai |
lines.english: He installed the royal canopy over Lehna's head; chanting the Lord's Praises, He drank in the Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕਿ ਰਾਜੁ ਚਲਾਇਆ ਸਚੁ ਕੋਟੁ ਸਤਾਣੀ ਨੀਵ ਦੈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak raaj chalaaeaa sach kott sataanee neev dai |
lines.english: Nanak established the kingdom; He built the true fortress on the strongest foundations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਚੇਲੇ ਰਹਰਾਸਿ ਕੀਈ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਸਲਾਮਤਿ ਥੀਵਦੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur chele raharaas keeee naanak salaamat theevadai |
lines.english: The Guru bowed down to His disciple, while Nanak was still alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰ ਆਤਮ ਦੇਵ ਦੀ ਖੜਗਿ ਜੋਰਿ ਪਰਾਕੁਇ ਜੀਅ ਦੈ ॥
lines.translit: mat gur aatam dev dee kharrag jor paraakue jeea dai |
lines.english: The Guru implanted the almighty sword of the Teachings to illuminate his soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਹਣੇ ਦੀ ਫੇਰਾਈਐ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਦੋਹੀ ਖਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: lahane dee feraaeeai naanakaa dohee khatteeai |
lines.english: Nanak proclaimed Lehna's succession - he earned it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤਿ ਓਹਾ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਸਾਇ ਸਹਿ ਕਾਇਆ ਫੇਰਿ ਪਲਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jot ohaa jugat saae seh kaaeaa fer palatteeai |
lines.english: They shared the One Light and the same way; the King just changed His body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਿ ਟਿਕਾ ਦਿਤੋਸੁ ਜੀਵਦੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: seh ttikaa ditos jeevadai |1|
lines.english: The King, while still alive, applied the ceremonial mark to his forehead. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਹਿ ਜਿ ਗੁਰ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਆ ਸਿਲ ਜੋਗੁ ਅਲੂਣੀ ਚਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: kareh ji gur furamaaeaa sil jog aloonee chatteeai |
lines.english: He does as the Guru commands; He tasted the tasteless stone of Yoga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੁਲੈ ਸੁ ਛਤੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੀ ਮਲਿ ਤਖਤੁ ਬੈਠਾ ਗੁਰ ਹਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jhulai su chhat niranjanee mal takhat baitthaa gur hatteeai |
lines.english: The immaculate canopy waves over Him, and He sits on the throne in the Guru's shop.
